query: astro vite outdated optimize dep dashboard

results.title: Astro dashboard runtime import fix
results.content: Fixed the Astro admin console integration bug where inline page scripts imported ../lib/api/admin directly and the browser fetched /lib/api/admin as a raw module path, causing 404s. Moved setup, login, and clients page logic into bundled script entry files under src/dashboard/src/scripts and referenced them from Astro pages via ?url so Vite/Astro emits proper dashboard asset URLs. Backend API contracts did not need changes.

results.title: Astro dashboard CSS path fix
results.content: The Astro admin console was missing base=/dashboard in src/dashboard/astro.config.mjs, so built CSS and JS assets resolved to root /_astro paths and failed when served by the Python app under /dashboard. Setting base to /dashboard fixes asset URLs; the dashboard bundle or Docker image must be rebuilt after the change because existing dist output still contains old asset paths.

results.title: Repository-first dashboard entry and unified header
results.content: Made /dashboard and post-login browser flow land on /dashboard/repositories instead of /dashboard/clients. Updated src/minder/presentation/http/admin/dashboard.py, src/dashboard/src/scripts/dashboard-entry.ts, and src/dashboard/src/scripts/login-page.ts to keep server-side and client-side redirects aligned. Refactored src/dashboard/src/layouts/DashboardLayout.astro with showPageIntro so pages with their own hero sections do not render a duplicate title block, and enabled that mode across the registry/detail/dashboard shells. Updated transition trackers to mark the delivered transition phases DONE and moved remaining enhancements into backlog language. Validation: bun run check, uv run pytest tests/integration/test_setup_dashboard_gate.py tests/integration/test_http_admin_expansion.py, uv run ruff check ..., uv run mypy src/minder/presentation/http/admin/dashboard.py.

results.title: Dashboard frontend aligned to Astro 6 baseline
results.content: Audited the dashboard frontend config against Astro 6 docs. package.json now targets astro ^6.1.4, keeps Bun as the package manager, and declares Node >=22.12.0 for non-Bun frontend tooling in line with the Astro v6 upgrade guide. The strict tsconfig export path had already been fixed separately. bun.lock still needs regeneration in an environment with Bun available.

results.title: Astro dashboard UX refinement
results.content: Refined the Astro admin console UX by making onboarding snippets full-width readable cards with copy buttons, keeping connection-test and key-lifecycle failures inline instead of redirecting away on 401, and switching the header from a global Setup/Login/Clients button set to contextual per-page navigation. Also updated the frontend API client to surface backend error messages instead of generic status-only errors.
